zh.Aldersey, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾阿爾德瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Dutton於大約1209年出生在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯時，她的父親Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley20歲，母親Agnes Massey22歲。她於大約1228年與William Hatton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Dutton于大约1209年出生在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley20岁，母亲Agnes Massey22岁。她于大约1228年与William Hatton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Dutton was born about 1209, in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England, her father, Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley, was 20 and her mother, Agnes Massey, was 22. She married William Hatton about 1228. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Dutton est née environ 1209, à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes Massey, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Hatton environ 1228. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Dutton um 1209 in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley 20 und ihre Mutter Agnes Massey 22. Sie hat um 1228 William Hatton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Dutton è nata il circa 1209 nel Great Budworth, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Agnes Massey, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Hatton circa 1228. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Duttonが約1209年にイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tableyは20歳，母Agnes Masseyは22歳であった。約1228年にWilliam Hattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Dutton(이)가 대략 1209년 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Massey(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1228년 William Hatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Dutton nasceu aproximadamente 1209, em Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Massey, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hatton aproximadamente 1228. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Dutton родилась около 1209 г. в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Massey, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hatton около 1228 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Dutton nació aproximadamente 1209, en Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Dutton of Nether Tabley, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agnes Massey, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William Hatton aproximadamente 1228. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
